# restoreLab — Mobile Detailing & Restoration

> Premium mobile car detailing service in Barcelona metropolitan area
> (Sant Cugat, Pedralbes, Terrassa, etc.). Specialties: paint correction,
> ceramic coating, glass polishing, headlight restoration, acrylic restoration.

## Services

- [Car Paint Correction](https://restorelab.io/en/services/car-paint-correction): Multi-stage machine polishing for swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation removal.
- [Glass Polishing](https://restorelab.io/en/services/glass-polishing): Windshield scratch removal, water stain removal, and clarity restoration.
- [Acrylic Restoration](https://restorelab.io/en/services/acrylic-restoration): UV-damaged plexiglass restoration for motorcycle visors, boat windows, and acrylic surfaces.
- [Headlight Restoration](https://restorelab.io/en/services/headlight-restoration): UV-yellowed lens restoration with sealant for clarity and durability.
- [Interior Leather Restoration](https://restorelab.io/en/services/interior-leather): Leather seat conditioning, color repair, and sun damage restoration.
- [Pre-Sale Detailing Pack](https://restorelab.io/en/services/pre-sale-pack): Comprehensive detailing to maximize used-car listing photos and sale price.

## Service areas

Sant Cugat del Vallès, Barcelona, Terrassa, Matadepera, Sant Just Desvern, Sant Quirze del Vallès, Bellaterra, Pedralbes, Sant Gervasi – Tres Torres, Castelldefels, Alella · Tiana · Teià.

## Pricing

- Express Refresh: €149
- Single-Stage Correction: €289
- Two-Stage Correction: €549
- Ceramic Coating 2Y: €649
- Ceramic Coating 5Y: €1049
